description: Create a Word document titled 'Office Emergency Response Procedures' using 'Legal Style' multi-level numbering (1. / 1.1 / 1.1.1) and save it to Documents/Emergency_Response_Procedures.docx. The document must contain three main sections: 'Fire Emergency', 'Medical Emergency', and 'Severe Weather'. The 'Fire Emergency' section includes level 2 items 'Detection and Alarm' (with level 3 items 'Activate nearest fire alarm pull station' and 'Call 911 from a safe location'), 'Evacuation' (with level 3 items 'Use nearest marked exit', 'Do not use elevators', and 'Proceed to designated assembly point'), and 'Post-Evacuation' (with level 3 items 'Account for all personnel'

level3: Activate nearest fire alarm pull station
Report missing persons to emergency responders
Do not move the injured person unless in immediate danger
Administer CPR if trained and certified
Use AED if available and trained
Move to interior rooms on lowest floor
Stay away from windows and exterior walls
Move equipment to higher ground if time permits
Evacuate building if directed by management
